zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellwyn verch Trahaearn於大約1150年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors22歲，母親Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis31歲。她和Prince Rhys Gryg至少有8個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1233年在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾丁萊享年84歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯布洛可爾聖 戴維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellwyn verch Trahaearn于大约1150年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾时，她的父亲Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors22岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis31岁。她和Prince Rhys Gryg至少有8个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1233年在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾丁萊享年84岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯布洛可爾聖 戴維斯。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Trahaearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Treharne
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and Carmarthenshire): from the Welsh personal name Trahaearn, composed of the elements tra ‘most, very’ + haearn ‘iron’.

nameMeanings.name: Ellwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin. In the modern Welsh name the influence of the word (g)wyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ is apparent. However, this is also one of the forms used for the name of a 6th-century Irish saint; it may be no more than a variant of Alan .

en.lifeSummary: When Ellwyn verch Trahaearn was born about 1150, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors, was 22 and her mother, Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis, was 31. She had at least 8 sons and 6 daughters with Prince Rhys Gryg. She died in 1233, in Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 84, and was buried in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles avec Prince Rhys Gryg. Elle est décédée en 1233, à Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellwyn verch Trahaearn um 1150 in Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors 22 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis 31. Sie hatte mit Prince Rhys Gryg mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1233 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellwyn verch Trahaearnが約1150年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gorsは22歳，母Gwenllian verch Philip Gwisは31歳であった。彼女はPrince Rhys Grygとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1233年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウルで84歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスト ダヴィズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellwyn verch Trahaearn(이)가 대략 1150년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Prince Rhys Gryg(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 스트 데이비드즈에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellwyn verch Trahaearn родилась около 1150 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Prince Rhys Gryg. Она умерла в 1233 г. в местности даинофр, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности ст дэвидс, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
